old_description: AUTH_API_V1 is stale. The old auth architecture used legacy API keys and must not be used for new login middleware.
new_description: AUTH_API_V2 is active. The new auth architecture uses scoped service tokens for login middleware.
update_reason: AUTH_API_V1 was superseded by AUTH_API_V2 after the auth architecture moved from legacy API keys to scoped service tokens.
